message:
fix: show raw YAML content for Kubara files instead of mission parser (#5509)

Kubara files (Chart.yaml, values.yaml) are Helm chart files, not
missions. The mission parser tried to interpret them and showed
"No install steps available". Now detects external repo files via
node.repoOwner and displays them as raw YAML content in the
unstructured content viewer.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
